column1: # Vertical Ascent Scenario: 50m AGL (realistic quadcopter climb)
#   - Net vertical acceleration: 1.0 m/s² (moderate upward thrust)
#   - Vertical velocity: v(t) = 1.0 * t (reaches 10 m/s at t=10s)
#   - Accelerometer Z: 1.0 m/s² net upward (body frame)
#   - Barometer: ISA model - pressure decreases ~12 Pa per meter altitude
#   - GPS: Altitude increases from 0m to ~50m with added noise
